name: Tech Tuesday: Reason Behind the Seasons
description: Tech Tuesday: Reason Behind the Seasons📅 Tuesday, December 16 | 3:00–4:00 PM📍 Library Classroom

name: Tech Meetup
description:
Low-key in-person meetup for people who are either in tech, interested in starting a career in tech, or love playing with tech as a hobby.

The meeting is at Whole Foods in Kaka'ako, in the outside cafe seating.

More info on the Honolulu Tech Network website:
[https://honolulu.network/~tech](https://honolulu.network/~tech/)

There's usually no real set topic, often people ask what we talk about so here's a sampling of common topics:

* AI
* ChatGPT
* Career stuff
* Other tech communities and events
* Web development
* Agile
* What places exist in Honolulu and where they are
* Renewable energy

name: Miki Hardisty: "Why I'm Blowing up my Tech Architecture Every Six Months "
description:
Join us on **January 22nd, 6:30–8:30pm** for an evening of *real-world* AI engineering with local legend **Miki Hardisty**, CEO & Co-Founder of **Olelo Intelligence**.

Miki Hardisty is a seasoned technology executive with over 30 years of experience as technology leader in the finance, computer hardware and professional services sector and holds significant expertise in AI, data science, and software engineering.

Miki will cover:
1\. The Disruption Imperative in the Age of AI \- Three Pillars of Creative Destruction

* Rapidly Changing AI Landscape
* Tool Revolution
* Competitive Reality

2\. Tonight's Promise:

* How to do it faster, more efficiently and better
* Real examples from Olelo's Journey
* A sustainable engineering framework

\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-\-
Topics Covered:

* Model Evolution Timeline
* The Tools Evolution: From Copy-Paste to AI Agents and Subagents
* The Engineering Framework: Controlled Chaos
* Mastering Architectural Disruption
* The Competitive Advantage of Agility

Want to learn more about Olelo Intelligence? Visit https://olelo-ai.com .

Sponsored by Darshaun Nadeau **(**https://flowingblue.com) and Kevin Riggen (https://oahu.ai) this session will focus on **how to actually use today’s leading LLMs to ship code and tools**, not just talk about them.

Huge mahalos to our event sponsor **JPG Media**! Check them out at https://jpgmedia.com .
